I just read the guide, what is divine realm aqueor, propagation caro and singularity ultra? is it like stronger character each realm?
They are characters that through a passive talent affect the way a realm works

Divine Aequor (or DAquor) is the aequor realm except its stances are stronger at the drawback of 3 turn cooldowns, its main draw is the white stance shield can basically negate all damage that turn

Singularity Ultra (or SUltra) gives a massive buff to your cards by existing, additionally when annihilating you instead get the leftmost card back from ultra space with massive buffs… drawback is annihilation is 3 turn cooldown, ultra turn is now also a turn extension instead of a new turn altogether which is both a good thing for some things and a bad thing for others

Propagation Caro (or PCaro) increases the embryo bar to 200 and in exchange creates propagation embryos, which upon eating boosts your exalt, also makes crimson furnace buildup worse and puts it at a 3 turn cooldown
talents for Murphy:Fauxborn, Vortice, Saya, Arachne. You can read what they do in their talent description ingame but it's pretty much a novel.
